$description: Shadow elevation tokens extracted from Patina component audit (2026-03-25). All values are Tailwind v4 defaults — no custom shadow overrides in globals.css or tailwind config.

none.$description: Reset / removal. Used by sidebar-header, input-group children, toggle-group flush spacing.

xs.$description: Tailwind shadow-xs. Subtle depth for form controls. Used by: input, textarea, select-trigger, checkbox, switch, button (outline), toggle (outline), toggle-group (outline), button-group, input-group, calendar dropdown, editable, data-table kbd.

sm.$description: Tailwind shadow-sm. Light elevation for containers. Used by: card, slider thumb, tabs-trigger (active), sidebar (floating variant), sidebar-inset, data-table action-bar.

md.$description: Tailwind shadow-md. Medium elevation for floating elements. Used by: dropdown-menu content, select content, popover, hover-card.

lg.$description: Tailwind shadow-lg. High elevation for modals and overlays. Used by: dialog, alert-dialog, draggable-dialog, sheet, dropdown-menu sub-content.

xl.$description: Tailwind shadow-xl. Maximum elevation for chart tooltips. Used by: chart tooltip.

sidebar-border.$description: Custom 1px outline-as-shadow for sidebar menu-button. Uses box-shadow instead of border for layout stability. Hover state swaps to --sidebar-accent.
